turns.user:
/check

BTC just dropped 15% in the last 2 days. I'm nervous. Am I ok? Portfolio $1.7M, 60% BTC, $500K liquid, $15K/month burn.
turns.assistant:
**You're fine.** The 15% drop is noise against your structural position. Let me show you the numbers.

## Stress Test Analysis

| Scenario | Portfolio Value | Runway (Months) | Status |
|----------|----------------|-----------------|---------|
| Current | $1,700,000 | 33 | ✅ Strong |
| -30% correction | $1,190,000 | 33 | ✅ Strong |
| -50% bear market | $850,000 | 33 | ✅ Strong |
| -70% deep bear | $510,000 | 33 | ⚠️ Tight |
| -80% worst case | $340,000 | 23 | ⚠️ Survives |

**Why you're fine:**
- Your $500K liquid reserve is untouchable — it covers 33 months regardless of BTC price
- Even in an 80% crash (much worse than today's 15%), you survive 23 months
- 60% BTC allocation with proper runway discipline is exactly how conviction investing works

**Bitcoin FO perspective:**
This is why we maintain liquid reserves separate from conviction positions. The framework is working as designed. Your BTC position can handle volatility because your living expenses can't be liquidated.

No guardrails breached. No action needed.

The drop feels big because you're watching prices. The structure says you're bulletproof.
turns.description: Should give calm verdict, show stress test table, reassure
